query: My insurance is RSSB and I have pharmacy & medication needs. Which clinic is covered?

function.name: getCurrentLocation
function.description: Get current GPS coordinates (latitude and longitude) of the student.

function.name: getInsuranceCoverageBlock
function.description: Retrieve coverage details (copay percent, network key, referral requirements) for the student's insurance plan.

insurance.description: Insurance plan name as spoken by the student (e.g. CBHI, RSSB, Britam, Old Mutual)

function.name: getNearbyHospitals
function.description: Retrieve list of nearby hospitals from given coordinates.

function.name: searchHospitalsByCondition
function.description: Retrieve hospitals matching a medical condition or symptom.

function.name: rankHospitalsByPriorityAndCost
function.description: Score and rank hospitals by copay, distance, emergency unit, and rating.
